summary: v0.6.24 release candidate is ready after the hosted lockfile review fix.
findings: bun.lock now records 0.6.24 for all publishable workspaces and internal workspace dependencies; frozen install, release parity, two focused release mutation files with 5 tests, and release:check pass.
residual_risks: Publication remains deferred until the refreshed PR head passes hosted checks and the merged main SHA completes Publish to npm.
